assumptions: Gemini quota is exhausted, so no new Gemini review should be requested.
A fake Codex agent plus fake gh executable can exercise pr-auto-fix's automated comment boundary.
Manual PR comments do not prove the automated review loop posts the checklist.
risks: Testing only stdout JSON misses reviewer-facing comment failures.
Testing only the local ledger misses PR conversation behavior.
Replacing PATH with only fake gh breaks system commands used by fake agents.
